parameters.query: SELECT response, source, confidence, created_at, expires_at, hit_count FROM solar_cache WHERE cache_key = $1 AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1;
UPDATE solar_cache SET hit_count = hit_count + 1, last_hit_at = NOW() WHERE cache_key = $1 RETURNING hit_count;

INSERT INTO solar_cache (cache_key, address, lat, lon, response, source, confidence)
SELECT $1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6, $7
WHERE $8::boolean = true
ON CONFLICT (cache_key) DO UPDATE SET
  response = EXCLUDED.response,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  created_at = NOW(),
  expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days',
  hit_count = 0,
  last_hit_at = NULL
RETURNING id;
